name: Patchbay 201 — Bot Workshop
description: Telegram Bot API and bot registration with BotFather; Polling architecture and the message loop; Command parsing, routing, and response handling; External API integration from bot context; State management and interactive conversation flow

criteria.narrative: Attend the full 4-hour Patchbay 201 — Bot Workshop and complete the in-workshop exercises. Completion is verified via a workshop-session hash.

@note_cpd: Workshops may be eligible for Continuing Professional Development (CPD) hours under relevant professional society frameworks (e.g., AusIMM Category 1 — Formal Learning) subject to member self-assessment and society audit.
